summary: Completed testing of Google OAuth redirect flow (Safari-compatible authorization code flow). Changed from popup-based to redirect-based flow works correctly. All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/google with code+redirect_uri correctly returns 401 for fake codes
Backend: POST /api/auth/google with credential (legacy popup flow) correctly returns 401 for fake tokens
Backend: POST /api/auth/google with no params returns 400 'Se requiere credential o code'
Backend: POST /api/auth/google with code but no redirect_uri returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials (admin@ucan.cl/admin123) returns 200 with token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user and returns token
Backend: POST /api/auth/register rejects duplicate email (400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register rejects password < 6 chars (400)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid JWT returns user data
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy
Frontend: Login page renders with 'Continuar con Google' button (not old GoogleLogin popup)
Frontend: Register page renders with 'Registrarse con Google' button
Frontend: Google button click generates correct redirect URL to accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth
Frontend: Redirect URL contains required params (client_id, redirect_uri, response_type=code, scope)
Frontend: /auth/google/callback route renders correctly with loading spinner
Frontend: /auth/google/callback handles error param (shows 'Inicio de sesión con Google cancelado')
Frontend: /auth/google/callback with fake code shows 'Error al verificar con Google' from backend
Frontend: Navbar is hidden on /auth/google/callback page
Frontend: Email/password login flow works correctly (regression test passed)
critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth redirect_uri needs to be registered in Google Cloud Console for production domain
The preview domain https://advisor-content-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/google/callback is not registered, causing redirect_uri_mismatch error from Google
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (emails with test_oauth_ and test_dup_ prefixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth redirect flow tested. Key changes: (1) Login.jsx and Register.jsx use handleGoogleRedirect() function that builds OAuth URL and does window.location.href redirect instead of GoogleLogin popup. (2) New GoogleCallback.jsx component at /auth/google/callback reads 'code' from URL, sends to backend POST /api/auth/google with code+redirect_uri. (3) Backend auth.py google_auth_login() now accepts both 'credential' (legacy popup) and 'code+redirect_uri' (new redirect flow). (4) Backend exchanges code for tokens via https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token. (5) The actual Google OAuth will fail with redirect_uri_mismatch until the preview domain is registered in Google Cloud Console - this is expected configuration issue, not a code bug.

features_tested.google_oauth_redirect_url: Login and Register pages generate correct OAuth URL with client_id, redirect_uri, response_type=code, scope, access_type, prompt params
features_tested.google_callback_page: Shows loading spinner, handles error param, handles code param, shows backend errors, redirects to login after errors
features_tested.backend_code_exchange: POST /api/auth/google accepts code+redirect_uri, exchanges with Google's token endpoint, returns 401 for invalid codes
features_tested.backend_legacy_credential: POST /api/auth/google still accepts credential param for legacy popup flow
features_tested.email_login_regression: Email/password login works correctly with admin@ucan.cl / admin123
features_tested.navbar_hiding: Navbar is correctly hidden on /auth/google/callback page

notes: The Google OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch error seen in testing is EXPECTED because the preview domain is not registered in Google Cloud Console. The code implementation is correct. To enable actual Google sign-in, the redirect URI https://advisor-content-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/google/callback must be added to the Authorized redirect URIs in Google Cloud Console for the OAuth client.
